scripts.convex:init: vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex init
scripts.convex:env:list:dev: vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex env list
scripts.convex:env:list:prod: APP_ENV=production vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex env list --prod
scripts.dev:convex: vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex dev
scripts.dev:convex:once: vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex dev --once
scripts.build:auth: vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex codegen --component-dir ./packages/auth/src/component && vp exec varlock run -- vp run '@robelest/convex-auth#build'
scripts.build:demo: vp run --filter @robelest/convex-auth build && vp run --filter svelte build
scripts.typecheck: vp run '@robelest/convex-auth#typecheck' && vp exec tsc --project tests/tsconfig.vitest.json --noEmit && vp run --filter cli typecheck
scripts.lint: vp lint convex tests packages/auth/src --type-aware --tsconfig tests/tsconfig.vitest.json && vp lint packages/auth/consumer --type-aware --tsconfig packages/auth/tsconfig.consumer.json && vp lint docs --type-aware --tsconfig docs/tsconfig.json && vp lint demos/expo --type-aware --tsconfig demos/expo/tsconfig.json && vp lint demos/cli --type-aware --tsconfig demos/cli/tsconfig.json && vp lint scripts vite.config.ts --type-aware --tsconfig tests/tsconfig.vitest.json
scripts.deploy:demo: vp exec convex deploy --cmd 'vp run build:demo' --cmd-url-env-var-name VITE_CONVEX_URL && vp exec static-hosting upload --prod --dist demos/svelte/build
scripts.deploy:demo:dev: vp run build:demo && vp exec static-hosting upload --dev --dist demos/svelte/build
scripts.publish:docs: vp run build:docs && vp run deploy:docs
scripts.codegen:convex: vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex codegen && vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex codegen --component-dir ./packages/auth/src/component
scripts.codegen:convex:component: vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex codegen --component-dir ./packages/auth/src/component
